Here is the list of zodiac signs and their respective scores on a scale of 1-10, along with a brief description:
1. Aries - 8/10 - Passionate and impulsive, but also a bit reckless.
2. Taurus - 7/10 - Practical and reliable, but can be stubborn at times.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Curious and adaptable, with a quick wit and sharp intellect.
4. Cancer - 6/10 - Emotional and nurturing, but can be overly sensitive.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, with a natural flair for drama.
6. Virgo - 8/10 - Analytical and hardworking, with attention to detail.
7. Libra - 9/10 - Diplomatic and social, with a strong sense of justice.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Passionate and intense, with a penetrating insight.
9. Sagittarius - 9/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, with a love for exploration.
10. Capricorn - 7/10 - Disciplined and ambitious, but can be overly critical.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Humanitarian and independent, with a strong sense of rebellion.
12. Pisces - 6/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, but can be dreamy and unrealistic.
